---
name: first-iteration
description: This prompt is used to build upon an existing hello world app. This iteration will add some functionality to the app, but will not be a complete product. The goal is to have a working version of the app that can be iterated upon in future prompts. 
---

Overview
* I want to add some form fields to this page to allow users to submit their name and email address.

Functionality
* Name and email should be text input fields with appropriate labels.
* There should be a submit button to submit the form.
* Lets rename the app from hello world to contact registration, and update the page title and header accordingly.
* When the form is submitted, I want to render a new page that says "Hello, [name]! Your email address [email] has been received."
* Don't worry about styling or validation at this stage, I just want to see the basic functionality working. 
* Im not too worried about persistance, as long as i can render form info on the new page, that will be good for now.

Additional notes:
- This is for a demo, im more concerned about getting something up and running quickly than following best practices.
